name: game-services-backend
description: Game services oRPC contract, backend store, Worker starter, and smoke flow.
question: What are the central Game Services backend flows for oRPC contracts, client adapters, backend store handlers, Cloudflare Worker fetch handlers, service binding methods, and local smoke tests?
draft: Use a tour because the Game Services backend crosses contract, client, backend, Worker starter, D1 store, and smoke tests.
review: A broad backend service flow should use a focused graph tour over the Worker app tsconfig so Cloudflare-specific source is included without changing the root graph project.
